svg.text: KZO-148 — Admin Impersonation UI + Request Flow
Mockup for scope-grill · separate cookie + blanket write-block + exit-then-start on re-impersonation
Manage roles, access, and impersonate for support-debug.
• Impersonating another admin is allowed — no special case (useful for debugging admin-only flows).
• Impersonating self is blocked server-side with 400 cannot_impersonate_self; UI grays the button on the row.
admin clicks Impersonate on alice@ · POST /admin/users/:id/impersonate
PANEL B · /portfolio while impersonating — target's data, admin's session identity
If a write attempt slips through…
PANEL C · request auth flow — resolveUserId + blanket write guard
Diagram: request-side resolution. Start/Exit routes themselves emit impersonation_start / impersonation_end independently.
